what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that associates the dragnet-development channel with a board item via a board:// URI, using only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no additional markdown body
The id follows the att- prefix pattern
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme
The file body is empty beyond metadata
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a markdown attachment file
Follows the channel-memory attachment naming convention att-<hash>.md
References an external board item by URI
concerns: No descriptive content or context about the board item
No indication of why this attachment was created
notes: A bare metadata stub linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-47cb5563.
questions: What content or state does board item item-47cb5563 represent?
What is the intended semantics of attachment_type 'board_items'?
Why does the attachment have no body or explanatory text?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment targeting a board item, which matches the file content exactly.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channels and board items
intention_signals: It appears designed to record that a particular board item is relevant to the dragnet-development channel, making the relationship discoverable in channel memory.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the target board item is a distinct linking convention.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped metadata association between a channel and a board item, which a fused system could use to navigate from channel memory to board content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items linking the dragnet-development channel to board item item-47cb5563.
intention_for_embedding: To record the association between a channel and a board item for retrieval and traceability.
